Hi Eric,
Can't we ignore  D000 &  D001 errors ?
As per RTD, it says that we can use "doc8 --ignore D000,D001 <file>" to check the rst files based on the below link
https://docs.onap.org/en/frankfurt/guides/onap-developer/how-to-use-docs/include-documentation.html#one-rst-file

Thanks,
Rama
